transcript.text: I live in Boulder, the August of 17th, 2020.
Let me tell you what's going on.

I was just blabbing about my situation.
And I forgot to say what happened.
So the day before yesterday, I didn't get up until 1030,
Which totally depressed me and made me not want to do anything.
So I called my mom because I was up all night,
Just like twiddling my thumbs.
And then I set my alarm for five and my alarm didn't get me up.
Somehow, it didn't wake me up.
And that really frustrated me because I had it set to loud
Because it didn't get me up the day before
Because it wasn't set to loud because that phone wasn't updated.
And then I didn't have, I had the proximity setting on.
So when the phone didn't wake me up, when it was set to loud,
That just really disappointed me, freaked me out.
I'm a neurotic person.
So sometimes if stuff doesn't go right,
It totally topples all of my cards.

Even though I decided I'm not going to get any exercise that day.
So I called my mom, hopefully, that she would be up for cleaning her house

Every single day I call her.
